allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add auto-update support & installation documentation

✨ Features:
- Add @updateURL & @downloadURL to UserScript header
- Tampermonkey now checks for updates weekly automatically
- Users can manual trigger update check in Tampermonkey

📚 Documentation:
- Add INSTALL.md with detailed installation guide
- Add installation badge/button to README.md
- Document auto-update process
- Add troubleshooting section

🔧 Configuration:
- Update namespace to point to GitHub repo
- Add @homepage link
- Add @author field

✅ Benefits:
- One-click installation from GitHub
- Automatic version updates via Tampermonkey
- Simplified user experience
- Better distribution

📦 Files Changed:
- Kleinazeigen duplizieren oder smart neu einstellen.js (headers)
- README.md (installation section)
- INSTALL.md (new comprehensive guide)

Status: Ready for distribution
EOF
)")
